sql_array: CREATE TABLE events (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, event_time TIMESTAMP, event_name TEXT, duration INTERVAL);

INSERT INTO events (id, event_time, event_name, duration) VALUES (1, TIMESTAMP '1992-09-20 20:38:40', 'Event A', INTERVAL '1 HOUR'), (2, TIMESTAMP '2023-10-15 10:00:00', 'Event B', INTERVAL '30 MINUTE');

SELECT e.id, e.event_name, date_part(['year', 'month', 'day'], e.event_time) AS event_date, e.duration - INTERVAL 15 MINUTE AS adjusted_duration FROM events e WHERE adjusted_duration > INTERVAL '0 MINUTE';
SELECT e.id, date_part(['year', 'month'], e.event_time) || ' ' || e.event_name AS combined_info FROM events e WHERE e.event_time IS NOT NULL ORDER BY combined_info;
SELECT t.timestamp_value, date_part(['year', 'month', 'day'], t.timestamp_value - INTERVAL '1 DAY') AS previous_day FROM timestamps t WHERE t.timestamp_value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT e.event_name, date_part(['year', 'month', 'day'], e.event_time - e.duration) AS adjusted_date FROM events e WHERE e.duration < INTERVAL '1 HOUR' HAVING adjusted_date IS NOT NULL;
SELECT e.id, date_part(['year', 'month'], e.event_time) AS year_month FROM events e JOIN timestamps t ON t.timestamp_value = e.event_time - INTERVAL '1 HOUR' WHERE t.timestamp_value IS NULL;
SELECT e.id, COUNT(*) AS event_count, MAX(date_part(['year', 'month'], e.event_time)) AS latest_month FROM events e GROUP BY e.id HAVING event_count > 1;
SELECT DISTINCT date_part(['year', 'month'], e.event_time - INTERVAL (e.duration) ) AS year_month FROM events e;
